_comment: coupling.max is the only field .claude/skills/code-qualities-assessment/scripts/assess.py (and its src/copilot-cli mirror) reads for coupling (compares coupling.value > max). Set to 10 (the score ceiling) to disable the check until the script's threshold direction is reconciled with the scoring direction (higher score = less coupling = better; current max-based check is inverted). min/warn for coupling are not consumed by the script today.
